title: Set 6: The Big Football Match ⚽
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Yesterday was a very special day for our school team. We went to the city

to play in the final football competition. There were hundreds of people there watching us.

The
on the other team were very tall and strong, but we weren't afraid. We played the
for over an hour. It was very difficult. Then, in the last five minutes, my friend Harry ran

a great goal!

We were so happy when the whistle blew. The teacher gave us a beautiful
to take back to our school. We all felt like famous stars! My parents took the whole team out for pizza to celebrate our victory.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A rainy day in the city

explanations_vi: Các cầu thủ (players) đội bạn rất cao và khỏe.
Chúng tôi đã chơi trận đấu (match) trong hơn một giờ.
Bạn tôi Harry đã chạy rất nhanh (quickly) với quả bóng.
Và đã ghi (scored) một bàn thắng tuyệt vời.
Giáo viên đã trao cho chúng tôi một chiếc cúp (cup) đẹp mang về trường.
Tiêu đề A (Chiến thắng trong cuộc thi) là đúng nhất vì kể về việc đội bóng đã giành cúp vô địch.
